title: Избранные проекты
subtitle: Подборка веб-приложений и цифровых продуктов, которые я разработал.
noResults: Не найдено проектов, соответствующих вашим критериям.

list.description: Real-time threat monitoring platform with advanced analytics, customizable widgets, and automated alerts.
list.fullDescription: **This** platform allows security teams to monitor network traffic, detect anomalies, and respond to threats in real-time. Built with high performance in mind, it handles thousands of data points per second. Key features include custom drag-and-drop widgets, automated incident reporting, and seamless integration with third-party SIEM systems.

list.description: A high-performance modular headless commerce platform with instant search and server-side rendering.
